name: Chicken Marinade (Really Good!)
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup red wine vinegar, no substitutions
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Add boneless chicken and marinate overnight in the refrigerator.
3. Grill or broil the chicken until cooked through.
4. Serve chicken breasts whole or shred for fajitas.
5. This is an excellent marinade for chicken.
